title: Chakram
description: A new mid-range throwing weapon made from echo shards!
body:
![Chakram Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/becf2d8578efd911cf95e2837979c559ce9f6bb4.png)
![Chakram Item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d42f4b7c550466eb008244530e96c8f81b368129.png)
---
#### Chakram adds a new mid-range throwing weapon made from echo shards and breeze rods, the chakram! When thrown, chakrams will ricochet off of any blocks they hit. For each ricochet, the damage done by the chakram will increase! The chakram will fly right back into your hand if you hit an entity or throw it the maximum distance!

This datapack does have a resource pack, which adds the texture for the chakram! If you're downloading the mod version, you do not need to install the resource pack!

**The resource pack is contained within the datapack itself, just drop the whole zip into your game's resource pack folder!**

#### **For details on function and recipes, check out the [wiki](https://github.com/maybejake/chakram/wiki)!**

# Demonstration
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/XRb1nI6yZEs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Enchantments
The chakram is compatible with existing vanilla enchantments such as sharpness, bane of arthropods, smite and fire aspect, unbreaking and mending! However, new ones have been added just for the chakram that can be obtained from ancient city chests:
- Lightweight - Increases the chakram's range by 5 blocks per level. Has a maximum level of 3
- Bouncing - Causes the chakram to bounce to the next nearest entity on hit, bounces to one extra entity per level. Has a maximum level of 3 and is not compatible with Phasing
- Phasing - Causes the chakram to phase through AND damage entities, phasing through one extra entity per level. Has a maximum level of 5 and is not compatible with Bouncing
- Harvesting - Allows the chakram to break blocks such as crops, grass and flowers without ricocheting!
- Ricochet - Increases the damage gained from each block ricochet by 0.5 damage per level. Has a maximum level of 5 and is not compatible with any other damage enchantments!

# Thanks
Thanks to my partner, Avery for the texture! <3
